---
title: "Real Analysis"
description: "Limits, continuity, differentiation, integration and the foundations of the real numbers."
course-order: 3
kind: course
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.content-block .mn-course-structure}
::: {.mn-status-card}
<p class="mn-kicker">COURSE HUB</p>

## Materials will grow here

Lecture notes and resources will be added as the course develops. New and featured material will be kept easy to find from this page.
:::

::: {.mn-structure-list}
<span>OVERVIEW</span>
<span>LECTURE NOTES</span>
<span>INTERACTIVES</span>
<span>EXERCISES</span>
<span>RESOURCES & LINKS</span>
:::
:::
